message:
fix: use macOS virtual keycodes for keyboard input

Ghostty expects macOS virtual keycodes (e.g., a=0x00, backspace=0x33),
not its own enum values. This fixes keyboard input including backspace,
quote, shifted characters, and special keys.

- Send raw e.code strings from browser to server
- Map JS key codes to macOS virtual keycodes on server
- Include key text for character input
- Remove client-side keyCodeMap (mapping now on server)
